creator: relaxbsd@gmail.com
text:
Fix the errors(Can't send E-mail from my maintainer's Mail host).Thanks!

http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=113640

--- emesene2.shar begins here ---
# This is a shell archive.  Save it in a file, remove anything before
# this line, and then unpack it by entering "sh file".  Note, it may
# create directories; files and directories will be owned by you and
# have default permissions.
#
# This archive contains:
#
#	emesene
#	emesene/Makefile
#	emesene/distinfo
#	emesene/files
#	emesene/pkg-descr
#	emesene/pkg-plist
#	emesene/files/emesene.desktop.in
#	emesene/files/emesene.sh.in
#
echo c - emesene
mkdir -p emesene > /dev/null 2>&1
echo x - emesene/Makefile
sed 's/^X//' >emesene/Makefile << 'END-of-emesene/Makefile'
X# New ports collection makefile for:	emesene
X# Date created:				31 May 2007
X# Whom:					Yinghong.Liu <liu_yinghong@yahoo.com.cn>
X#
X# $FreeBSD$
X#
X
XPORTNAME=	emesene
XPORTVERSION=	0.20070523
XCATEGORIES=	net-im python gnome
XMASTER_SITES=	${MASTER_SITE_SOURCEFORGE}
XMASTER_SITE_SUBDIR=	${PORTNAME}
XDISTNAME=	${PORTNAME}-230507
X
XMAINTAINER=	liu_yinghong@yahoo.com.cn
XCOMMENT=	An OS independent MSN Messenger client writed in python and GTK
X
XBUILD_DEPENDS=	${PYTHON_SITELIBDIR}/dbus/__init__.py:${PORTSDIR}/devel/py-dbus \
X		${PYTHON_SITELIBDIR}/gtk-2.0/pynotify/__init__.py:${PORTSDIR}/devel/py-notify
XRUN_DEPENDS=	${PYTHON_SITELIBDIR}/dbus/__init__.py:${PORTSDIR}/devel/py-dbus \
X		${PYTHON_SITELIBDIR}/gtk-2.0/pynotify/__init__.py:${PORTSDIR}/devel/py-notify
X
XWRKSRC=		${WRKDIR}/${PORTNAME}
X
XUSE_ZIP=	yes
XUSE_PYTHON=	yes
XUSE_GNOME=	pygtk2
X
XSUB_FILES=	emesene.sh emesene.desktop
X
Xpost-patch:
X	@${CHMOD} a+x ${WRKSRC}/emesene
X
Xdo-build:
X	(${ECHO} 'import compileall'; \
X		${ECHO} 'compileall.compile_dir("${WRKSRC}/")') | \
X		${PYTHON_CMD}
X
Xdo-install:
X	@${MKDIR} ${DATADIR}
X	@${CP} -R ${WRKSRC}/* ${DATADIR}/
X	@${INSTALL_SCRIPT} ${WRKDIR}/emesene.sh ${PREFIX}/bin
X	@${INSTALL_DATA} ${WRKDIR}/emesene.desktop ${PREFIX}/share/applications
X
X.include <bsd.port.mk>
END-of-emesene/Makefile
echo x - emesene/distinfo
sed 's/^X//' >emesene/distinfo << 'END-of-emesene/distinfo'
XMD5 (emesene-230507.zip) = 0d3a1b86d96c3dbc7f6c650a1aa33dae
XSHA256 (emesene-230507.zip) = 04baa0a166fca4058d5d9c222ab6695d54632705c27b9433c363e2d6ce75bc91
XSIZE (emesene-230507.zip) = 884370
END-of-emesene/distinfo
echo c - emesene/files
mkdir -p emesene/files > /dev/null 2>&1
echo x - emesene/pkg-descr
sed 's/^X//' >emesene/pkg-descr << 'END-of-emesene/pkg-descr'
Xemesene is an OS independent MSN Messenger client writed in python and GTK.
XThe main idea is to make a client similar to the official MSN Messenger
Xclient but kepping it simple and with a nice GUI.
X
XWWW: http://www.emesene.org/
END-of-emesene/pkg-descr
echo x - emesene/pkg-plist
sed 's/^X//' >emesene/pkg-plist << 'END-of-emesene/pkg-plist'

Xshare/applications/emesene.desktop
